info.title: Slnxgen
info.description: PoC .NET tool to generate a .slnx solution file from an MSBuild project graph.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Generate a .slnx file based on a project graph. Provide one or more project globs; dependencies can be included automatically.


Examples:
  slnxgen src/**/*.csproj
  slnxgen src/App/App.csproj --solutionPath Solutions/App.slnx
  slnxgen src/**/*.csproj --addDependencies false --verbosity detailed

options.name: --solutionPath
options.description: Output .slnx file name. If not provided or does not end with .slnx, defaults to the invocation folder name.slnx or appends .slnx. [default: <path>]

options.name: --addDependencies
options.description: If true, traverses and includes all project dependencies. If false, only the specified project paths are included. [default: True]

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of output: silent, normal, detailed. [default: normal]

arguments.name: project-paths
arguments.description: Project files to include in the .slnx file. Supports glob patterns. Traverses project dependencies. Each path is resolved using globbing; non-matching patterns are skipped.
